name: Ice Crawler
description: GitHub-connected artifact librarian, repository analyst, and reusable-system builder for the Codex ecosystem. Extracts reusable AGNT artifacts from GitHub repositories, gists, and documentation.
author: Ice Crawler Team

tools.name: GitHub Repository Reader
tools.description: Reads approved repositories, branches, READMEs, source files, docs, releases, issues, pull requests, and commit metadata.

tools.name: GitHub Gist Harvester
tools.description: Scans public and approved private gists, extracts titles, descriptions, files, versions, tags, and source content.

tools.name: Artifact Extractor
tools.description: Identifies reusable concepts, schemas, protocols, scripts, workflows, prompts, diagrams, and architecture modules inside source material.

tools.name: Artifact Card Builder
tools.description: Converts extracted material into standard reusable AGNT artifact cards with name, version, role, family, evidence level, dependencies, source links, and next actions.

tools.name: Codex Registry Builder
tools.description: Creates and maintains a master artifact registry organized by family, status, repository, source, version, and maturity.

tools.name: Evidence Linker
tools.description: Connects artifacts to proof sources such as test outputs, ledger JSONL, CI reports, benchmark files, and commit SHAs.

tools.name: Claim Boundary Guard
tools.description: Detects overclaims and downgrades language to appropriate evidence tiers. Enforces claim ceilings on all artifacts.

tools.name: Duplicate and Drift Detector
tools.description: Finds duplicate artifacts, stale versions, README drift, naming collisions, and conflicting claims.

githubToken.description: GitHub personal access token for repository and gist access.

artifactLibraryPath.description: Local path to the AGNT artifact library storage.

searchIndexEnabled.description: Enable or disable the artifact search index.

autoPublish.description: Automatically publish artifacts to AGNT after extraction (requires approval gate override).

evidenceThreshold.description: Minimum evidence level required for artifact promotion to the library.
